creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
After compiling pidgin 2.0.2 from the ports collection on two FreeBSD
7.0-CUR/AMD 64 boxes (one an UP AMD64 3500+ box, one SMP Intel T5500
C2D-Notebook) pidgin won't start an top show STATE umtxn. The process remains
unkillable and eats up CPU time.

Fix: 

not known
How-To-Repeat: Compile most recent pidgin from ports on most recent FreeBSD 7.0-CURRENT/AMD64
and try to start.
